subject: [RFC PATCH 14/45] mm: page_alloc: extract claim_whole_block from try_to_claim_block

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic of claiming a whole pageblock in the Linux kernel's memory management system. It extracts this logic into a standalone function called `claim_whole_block`, which handles the transition from free to used, changes the migratetype of the pageblock, and splits the block down to the requested order. This is done as part of a larger effort to prepare for reusing this logic in future patches related to per-superpageblock free lists. The patch makes no functional changes and is considered a pure refactoring effort.
